name: Oracle Corporation
description: Oracle Corporation is a global leader in enterprise software and cloud computing, providing a comprehensive suite of applications, databases, and infrastructure services. Renowned for its flagship relational database management system, the company has expanded significantly into cloud-based solutions through Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and autonomous database technologies. Oracle serves a diverse range of industries, offering integrated tools for enterprise resource planning (ERP), human capital management (HCM), and customer experience (CX), while maintaining a strong focus on security, scalability, and high-performance computing for modern digital enterprises.
